leadText: Dream Eater has several referrals: For the move introduced in Generation I, see Dream Eater (move) For the Pokémon whose category is "Dream Eater Pokémon", see Munna. For the Auto Deck Machine Deck from Pokémon Trading Card Game (video game), see Dream Eater Haunter Deck (TCG) For the e-Reader application, see Dream Eater (e-Reader)
